data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the 'Opt-in/opt-out management' requirement, which is a critical feature for the SMS Reminder System. However, the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that demonstrate the implementation of this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for opt-in/opt-out management, but there is no concrete evidence provided to confirm that this feature is operational, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of implementation for opt-in/opt-out management.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the opt-in/opt-out management functionality.
